description_long: This is a rectangular, dark-colored glass bottle with a black screw cap and a prominent, ornate label on the front reading 'Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 Tennessee Sour Mash Whiskey.' The bottle has a broad, flat front and back, with slightly rounded shoulders and a short neck. The front label is highly detailed, featuring white text and decorative borders on a black background, while the back and side labels provide additional product information and branding. The glass appears thick and sturdy, with a glossy finish that reflects light. The bottle is filled with a brownish liquid, visible through the transparent glass. The overall design is classic and iconic, often associated with whiskey bottles.
description: A rectangular, dark glass whiskey bottle with a black screw cap and ornate white-on-black Jack Daniel's branding, filled with brown liquid.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main Jack Daniel's label with ornate white text and branding on a black background.
description_view_1: Side view displays a secondary label with product and legal information in white text on black.
description_view_2: Back view reveals another large label with detailed product information and branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows additional label elements, including symbols and text, all in white on black.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label features 'Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 Tennessee Sour Mash Whiskey' in ornate white text on black; additional white-on-black labels with product and legal information on sides and back.
